displayNameZh: 街机清版游戏场景动画
summary: Yt Arcade Beat Em Up component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「街机清版游戏场景动画」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-arcade-beat-em-up/src/YtArcadeBeatEmUp.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtArcadeBeatEmUp` and `ytArcadeBeatEmUpDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Arcade Beat Em Up Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-arcade-beat-em-up to my project. Preserve the exported YtArcadeBeatEmUpProps API and register the YtArcadeBeatEmUp composition with the default props.
